meaning: vt.鞭打,鞭挞adj.鞭状的,鞭索形的,有鞭毛的n.鞭毛虫,鞭毛藻
examples: Relating to or caused by a flagellate organism.
From that day on, the farmer would not flagellate his ox anymore.
A single - celled microorganism, especially a flagellate protozoan of the genus Monas.
You can also watch Bob gleefully self-flagellate in this video debate with me.
